name: EPR PROPERTIES
business: EPR Properties is a self-administered Maryland real estate investment trust and a leading net lease investor in experiential real estate, focusing on venues that facilitate out-of-home leisure and recreation experiences. The Company's investments are generally structured as long-term triple-net leases or mortgages, with properties located in 43 states and Canada as of December 31, 2025. Total investments were approximately $7.0 billion, segmented into Experiential (94%) and Education (6%).
namedCustomers: Cineworld Group, plc, Regal Entertainment Group and other Regal theatre tenants (collectively, Regal)

exposures.sentence: As of December 31, 2025, our Experiential portfolio (excluding property under development, undeveloped land inventory and two joint venture properties) consisted of the following property types (owned or financed): 148 theatre properties;

As of December 31, 2025, our Experiential portfolio (excluding property under development, undeveloped land inventory and two joint venture properties) consisted of the following property types (owned or financed): ... 60 eat & play properties (including seven theatres located in entertainment districts);

As of December 31, 2025, our Experiential portfolio (excluding property under development, undeveloped land inventory and two joint venture properties) consisted of the following property types (owned or financed): ... 26 attraction properties;

As of December 31, 2025, our Experiential portfolio (excluding property under development, undeveloped land inventory and two joint venture properties) consisted of the following property types (owned or financed): ... 11 ski properties;

As of December 31, 2025, our Experiential portfolio (excluding property under development, undeveloped land inventory and two joint venture properties) consisted of the following property types (owned or financed): ... four experiential lodging properties;

As of December 31, 2025, our Experiential portfolio (excluding property under development, undeveloped land inventory and two joint venture properties) consisted of the following property types (owned or financed): ... 27 fitness & wellness properties;

As of December 31, 2025, our Experiential portfolio (excluding property under development, undeveloped land inventory and two joint venture properties) consisted of the following property types (owned or financed): ... one gaming property;

As of December 31, 2025, our Experiential portfolio (excluding property under development, undeveloped land inventory and two joint venture properties) consisted of the following property types (owned or financed): ... one cultural property.
As of December 31, 2025, our Education segment consisted of the following property types (owned or financed): 46 early childhood education center properties; and nine private school properties.
